description: A ground-level photograph depicting an orchard or grove of trees, likely almond trees, planted in rows on a terrain composed of reddish-brown soil, scattered rocks, and sparse green vegetation. A dry-stone wall runs along the left side of the image, parallel to a row of trees. In the foreground, an open notebook or folder with white pages and a blue cover rests on the ground; its contents are unreadable. Hills covered with vegetation are visible in the background. A partially obscured watermark in the bottom-left corner includes the year "2007".
